Background:  This is a V-8, gas vehicle.The 12-volt battery gives CRITICAL CHARGE notifications constantly.   Incident:  Dry pavement, 400-mile, January winter night, highway driving in Wisconsin Northwoods at posted 70 mph; some with cruise control, some without cruise control.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Mercedes-Benz S-Class owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 33 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (30% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
